title: Review this uncommitted diff for bugs, security issues, and code quality. Be concise (max 10 lines).
summary_text: No material findings in the tracked diff. The changes are limited to test shims in [tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py#L45) and [tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L36), and they look consistent with the newer `scheduler`/`x_poster` imports they need to satisfy. Residual risk: these mocks intentionally bypass real `get_secret` and quote-tweet behavior, so they only protect import-time compatibility, not runtime correctness of those helpers. I could not run the touched tests because `pytest` is not installed in this environment (`python3 -m pytest` -> `No module named pytest`).
